programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Tuckers throw a huge Thanksgiving party and Cameron spares no expense, while Jay has to figure out a way to keep his blood pressure down on one of the most stressful days of the year. While Phil tries to get used to Rainer Shine dating his daughter, Hayley has to break it to her dad that she would rather spend the rest of her holiday with her new boyfriend than stay for the traditional family football game

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teenage daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected, while Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club, and unwittingly helps Jay with his petition. At the Pritchett-Tucker home, Gloria, Phil and Cam have formed a secret alliance to ensure their respective mistakes are concealed from their spouses, but Mitchell starts suspecting something just isn't right

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes friends with a new girl at school named Harper, who happens to be extremely wealthy, Homer befriends Harper's father. However, Lisa decides to end the friendship when she realises that Harper is too entitled. With the guest voice of Kristen Bell (The Good Place)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer loses a large sum of money to Broadway legend Laney Fontaine in a poker game and, in order to settle his debt, he lends Lisa to the stage star for a month. Laney transforms Lisa into a showbiz kid, which leaves Homer and Marge wishing they'd never let her go

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfield's first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a parody of Richard Linklater's film Boyhood, this episode is a coming-of-age story chronicling Bart's life from the age of six to him becoming a fully accomplished young man. These factors shape his personality and his future more than he realises

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited

programme.desc: Sam Dushey, the CEO of Shoppers World, goes undercover in his own company. Since taking over the family business, Sam has made it his mission to expand Shoppers World rapidly, and he wants to make sure all of his stores are performing up to his high standards as the business grows. Among the employees he meets are a woman who has worked for the company for eight years without a pay rise, and another who was attacked with pepper spray while trying to stop a robbery

Tim thinks it's the perfect time to learn what's working and what needs an overhaul, so he meets staff including franchisees, a delivery driver, a food truck manager and a cashier whose flirtatious manner shocks him

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Fun-loving prison officer Noel is given £12,000 to plan his wedding to fiancee Jemma, who looks after their daughter Heidi full-time. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Professional wrestler Mike takes sole charge of planning his wedding to fiancee Becky. The bride-to-be dreams of a stylish, elegant ceremony, but her groom wants to spend their £12,000 budget on a celebration devoted to his sport

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sharon John, the president and CEO of Build-a-Bear Workshop, goes undercover in her company to work alongside the employees who custom-build stuffed animals in retail outlets and shops, and who work in the distribution warehouse and shipping department

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Karen Freeman-Wilson, the Mayor of Gary, Indiana, aims to reverse her city's economic decline and population loss. She dons a disguise to meet the city's workforce, including a sanitation plant operator, a fire fighter, a police officer and a beach maintenance worker

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Brick Hotel in Newtown, Pennsylvania, where the staff have had enough of owner Verindar, who runs the establishment like an angry tyrant. Can Gordon convince her to value her loyal workers and entice customers back to this landmark hotel?

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The occasion of Uncle Saul's funeral heralds the return of 'Horrible Grandma', who leaves a trail of broken furniture in her wake. Award-winning comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.desc: Mark and Sophie's big day arrives, but as the groom makes his way to the church with best man Jeremy and a very hung-over Super Hans, he continues to wrestle with crippling doubts that threaten to throw the event into disarray. Starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.desc: Mark rediscovers the single life following his disastrous marriage to Sophie, while he and Jeremy become victims of crime. Award-winning comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host from the West Midlands are free spirits Michelle and Carl, who present a menu based on home-grown produce. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.sub-title: Don't Tell the Bride: Christmas on Ice
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Nick from Crawley, West Sussex, is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee Rosie a winter wonderland wedding she will never forget - but has just three weeks to organise the ceremony

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Scott, CEO of clothing retailer New York & Company, disguises himself to go undercover among his own employees seeking ways to keep the business in vogue and increase profitability. He meets up with a sales associate, a fitting room stylist, a stocker and an assistant manager

Co-owner Marta is struggling, having been left with the entire burden of running such a large establishment alone. Can Gordon persuade her son Jimmy to finally take the reins and turn this business around before the family legacy is destroyed?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. His first stop is the New York community of Congers, where he hopes to save family-run Italian restaurant Bella Gianna's. Gordon and his team work round the clock to clean the premises, remodel the interior and revamp the menu, while also teaching the staff to prepare new dishes and work together as an efficient unit. programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. While the race for Greg Davies' gold-plated noggin remains too close to call, some important questions will be answered in this penultimate episode. What will Babátúndé Aléshé do with a power washer? Can Andy Zaltzman shoehorn cricket into yet another task? Will Jack Dee's son make his dad proud with some crucial information? Why has Rosie Jones smeared a plate with brown stuff? And what makes Emma Sidi such an effective supervisor? Rest assured, Alex Horne is on hand to note down all the crucial details

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and Henning Wehn compete against Jon Richardson and Victoria Coren Mitchell. Tom Allen joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters with 'help' from Joe Wilkinson

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: A naked newbie is thrown into the mix, turning heads and threatening budding relationships. Tensions boil and one dater is dumped for good

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics review Jamie's £1 Wonders, Married at First Sight Australia, Only Connect, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Fall, Naked and Afraid, BBC News and ITV News. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. Chief stewardess Aesha is worried that one of her charges might be a bit inexperienced for the high-end superyacht game. Also, on the very first night, there's a jet ski hoisting mishap

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. Barry obtains a fake ID and takes it to school to show off to his classmates. David Spade (Rules of Engagement) guest stars, with Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed to be cast in a minor role in the school musical, so Beverly helps him to land a leading part in a competing show. Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with groom Tommy, who decided a wedding on water skis was the way forward, given his bride Hannah's champion experience in the sport

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families, and Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Boat-dwelling Steven kicks off the competition in East Anglia, accompanied by his partner of 10 years, Lisa, with a Sunday lunch-inspired roast dinner with a fresh fish starter. Day two sees self-confessed snob Justine and partner Ben bring some class to the competition with an Italian themed evening. Finally it's the turn of Rosa and Darren who outsource all their ingredients from Spain

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. Chief stewardess Aesha is worried that one of her charges might be a bit inexperienced for the high-end superyacht game. Also, on the very first night, there's a jet ski hoisting mishap

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil goes into nesting mode after finding some abandoned duck eggs, while Mitchell worries about Cam's friendship with a group of frat boys. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire takes Haley and Alex into the office for Bring your Daughter to Work Day, while Phil joins Luke and Manny's class for a community service day that offers more lessons than expected. Meanwhile, Gloria is delighted to learn she has been chosen for jury duty, while Cam and Mitchell are in need of a mediator when they start bickering over who to invite to their party

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: There's a death in Springfield, while Krusty's confidence takes a beating after he appears on a TV comedy roast with Sarah Silverman and Jeff Ross, prompting him to retire from the business. Lisa becomes worried for Homer's safety, so sets out to prevent him getting hurt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge signs Homer and Bart up on a father-son bonding ocean voyage in a bid to heal their troubled relationship, and while the pair are away takes over Homer's fantasy football league. Animation, featuring the voice of Nick Offerman (Parks and Recreation)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts go head-to-head when Luke decides his best chance at getting into college is to run for senior class president against Manny. Phil insists on introducing Haley to marketing guru Merv Schechter (guest star Martin Short), while Cam makes a rash decision when he finds out his star football player is moving away

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil is unable to hide his excitement when he's invited to appear in a real-estate segment for the local news and the day gets even better after meeting his weatherman hero Rainer Shine (guest star Nathan Fillion). Meanwhile, Jay decides to infuse a little grit into Manny's video interview for his college application, and Lily decides to take matters into her own hands over her new house guest

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: Halloween 4: The Revenge of Rod Skyhook
programme.desc: The Dunphys try to get Luke's Halloween party going, Cam confronts his Halloween nemesis and Jay plans to go to a party at an old enemy's home to deliver an unforgettable trick

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell is thrown into the spotlight when Cam fails to fill him in on what his play is really about, while Phil threatens to spoil Jay's favourite place in the world when he considers becoming a member

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge visit a marriage counsellor and decide on a trial separation, during which Homer begins dating a twentysomething pharmacist. With the guest voices of Girls cast members Lena Dunham, Adam Driver, Jemima Kirke, Zosia Mamet and Allison Williams

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes the king of barbecues in Springfield after buying a grill from a mysterious man at a roadside shack and ends up being challenged to a cook-off by a TV chef

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge's twin sisters Selma and Patty agree to stop smoking after they learn their father died of lung cancer. When Selma relapses after just 10 minutes, an angry Patty moves in with Marge and Homer. Meanwhile, Maggie goes on an adventure with some local creatures

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to take down his festive decorations after Lisa is traumatised by Halloween Horror Night at Krustyland, but not everybody is understanding about it. Marge experiences difficulties when she takes Bart out to a trick-or-treating party

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Fed up with his family's feuding, Jack pleads with Beth, Leah throws a welcome home party for herself and Imran, while two residents get closer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge experiences mixed emotions when she is forced to replace the family car after an encounter with a sinkhole, while Bart becomes interested in Lisa's extracurricular activities after finding out about her covert meetings in town. With the guest voice of stock car racer Jeff Gordon

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Big mistakes are piling up already. The guests bombard chef Josh with eccentric requests, and a deckhand makes a crazy decision with a jellyfish

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, Race Across the World, Love Is Blind, The Dog Academy, Beef, Outlast, and ITV News coverage of Donald Trump's indictment. First shown in April 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Britain's Got Talent, Scared of the Dark, Obsession, Family Fortunes, The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, Love Is Blind, Inside the Factory and BBC news coverage of the nurses' strikes. First shown in April 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A 23-year-old virgin from Kent picks a partner from six nude candidates - but this proves a nerve-racking experience, since he has never seen a naked woman in his life. Meanwhile, a 27-year-old beauty therapist from London is determined to have a baby before she turns 30, and hopes that one of the men lurking behind the screens will be the perfect father

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: The singletons are left questioning their existing connections after the first dumping and a game of 'Dare or Bare' ends in floods of tears

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, Race Across the World, Love Is Blind, The Dog Academy, Beef, Outlast, and ITV News coverage of Donald Trump's indictment. First shown in April 2023

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Big mistakes are piling up already. The guests bombard chef Josh with eccentric requests, and a deckhand makes a crazy decision with a jellyfish

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam form a garage rock band and ask Laineyn and Erica to get involved, eventually leading to unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Charles and Diana's royal wedding has Bev wanting to renew her wedding vows with Murray. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam accidentally gets Barry kicked out of his cool group of friends, so he comes up with a plan to get his brother back in favour by convincing them he has the hacking skills to access the school's computer system to change their grades. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2011, Anna turned wedding planner for her girly bride-to-be Sian. Now they are back - along with Sian's mum Shirley and Anna's best woman Jade - to relive the climactic events

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Fed up with his family's feuding, Jack pleads with Beth, Leah throws a welcome home party for herself and Imran, while two residents get closer

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners compete for the £1,000 prize in the Colchester area, with Yvonne and Neil kicking off the week with a Spanish-themed menu. Tony and Victoria serve up a menu of hearty pub food, but a mix-up in the kitchen leads to a very disappointed guest, and on the final night, Darren and Amy aim to impress with an evening of unprocessed food

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Big mistakes are piling up already. The guests bombard chef Josh with eccentric requests, and a deckhand makes a crazy decision with a jellyfish

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: There is scepticism, competition and high emotions when Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famous doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book, Clean Out Your Junk Drawer, encourages people to get out all their emotional junk to become healthier people and better partners and spouses

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria rents a cabin in the mountains in which she hopes she and her family will be able to enjoy a picture-perfect white Christmas. However, when the clan arrives, unhelpful weather and a random eccentric guest conspire to ruin the festive cheer. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cam resolve to make up for their bad carolling experience last year, and Jay has a huge announcement that catches Claire off-guard. Comedy, starring Sofia Vergara

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge starts her own sandwich shop after her snacks become a huge hit at Springfield Elementary. However, running a business proves challenging - especially when the same franchise opens another location across the street

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Eco-disaster looms in Springfield when Mr Burns launches a controversial fracking operation - and while Homer is more than happy to play accomplice to his boss, an outraged Lisa calls on the services of bigshot politician Maxine Lombard (voiced by two-time Oscar winner Jane Fonda) to shut Burns down. Against the odds, however, the opponents end up falling for one another

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a crossover episode with Futurama, the Planet Express crew members travel back in time and turn up in Springfield on a mission to prevent the troublesome family from destroying the future. It's not just a question of asking nicely however - Bender has been programmed to kill Bart, Terminator-style. Can the clan foil the murderous bot?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Tuckers throw a huge Thanksgiving party and Cameron spares no expense, while Jay has to figure out a way to keep his blood pressure down on one of the most stressful days of the year. While Phil tries to get used to Rainer Shine dating his daughter, Hayley has to break it to her dad that she would rather spend the rest of her holiday with her new boyfriend than stay for the traditional family football game

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teenage daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected, while Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club, and unwittingly helps Jay with his petition. At the Pritchett-Tucker home, Gloria, Phil and Cam have formed a secret alliance to ensure their respective mistakes are concealed from their spouses, but Mitchell starts suspecting something just isn't right

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A simple texting error threatens everything when Manny and Luke put on a fancy winter ball at the school, Mitchell gets a wake-up call when he offers to help, while Jay's thinly veiled attempt to get out of it by pretending to want to spend time with Phil backfires. Vanessa Bayer guests stars as an overbearing mother

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch gets a shock when Cam calls a concierge to save his ruined New Year's Day feast, while Phil's dad Frank causes waves when he brings a date. Gloria and Jay have to decide who should take care of little Joe if something should ever happen to them. Guest starring Kelsey Grammer and Fred Willard

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes friends with a new girl at school named Harper, who happens to be extremely wealthy, Homer befriends Harper's father. However, Lisa decides to end the friendship when she realises that Harper is too entitled. With the guest voice of Kristen Bell (The Good Place)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer loses a large sum of money to Broadway legend Laney Fontaine in a poker game and, in order to settle his debt, he lends Lisa to the stage star for a month. Laney transforms Lisa into a showbiz kid, which leaves Homer and Marge wishing they'd never let her go

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfield's first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a parody of Richard Linklater's film Boyhood, this episode is a coming-of-age story chronicling Bart's life from the age of six to him becoming a fully accomplished young man. His tense relationship with Homer is catalogued, as is the fact that he is overshadowed by the more successful Lisa at every turn. These factors shape his personality and his future more than he realises

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone is happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and one dad panics

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on a selection of the week's TV, with cameras capturing their lively discussions as they sit down to watch the coronation ceremony and concert, The 1% Club, The Greatest Auction, Made in Chelsea and the local elections results on BBC News

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Gordon, Gino & Fred: Viva España, EastEnders, Top Guns: Inside the RAF, Beat the Chasers, Say Yes to the Dress with Tan France, The Yorkshire Vet, My Floating Home and ITV News coverage of the school concrete crisis. From September 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more people looking for love to take their pick from six nude candidates. Retired dentist Leanne is recently divorced and in search of a sexually experimental man, while former US marine Conor, who falls in love all too easily, is looking for his dream Englishwoman

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Sparks are flying as two guys clash over the same girl. Two more naked newbies get a baptism of fire with a tandem bike ride and while one couple's connection goes from strength to strength, doubts are cast about another relationship

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Pops is evicted after accidentally starting a fire in his flat during a Halloween party. Beverly invites him to move into the family home, but soon his wild lifestyle proves too much for them to handle. Comedy, starring George Segal

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. Soon after, Murray and Adam see Meller in a new light, so Beverly tries to get his job back for him. Meanwhile, Barry can't accept that Erica is better than him at a new board game - Trivial Pursuit

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2018, groom Lee hedged his bets on a wedding in a maze for bride Becky. Now, the pair are back - along with best man Shane and bridesmaid Lisa - to discuss their big day

programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts go head-to-head when Luke decides his best chance at getting into college is to run for senior class president against Manny. Phil insists on introducing Haley to marketing guru Merv Schechter (guest star Martin Short), while Cam makes a rash decision when he finds out his star football player is moving away

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil is unable to hide his excitement when he's invited to appear in a real-estate segment for the local news and the day gets even better after meeting his weatherman hero Rainer Shine (guest star Nathan Fillion). Meanwhile, Jay decides to infuse a little grit into Manny's video interview for his college application, and Lily decides to take matters into her own hands over her new house guest

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes the king of barbecues in Springfield after buying a grill from a mysterious man at a roadside shack and ends up being challenged to a cook-off by a TV chef

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge's twin sisters Selma and Patty agree to stop smoking after they learn their father died of lung cancer. When Selma relapses after just 10 minutes, an angry Patty moves in with Marge and Homer. Meanwhile, Maggie goes on an adventure with some local creatures

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to take down his festive decorations after Lisa is traumatised by Halloween Horror Night at Krustyland, but not everybody is understanding about it. Marge experiences difficulties when she takes Bart out to a trick-or-treating party

Meanwhile, a 27-year-old beauty therapist from London is determined to have a baby before she turns 30, and hopes that one of the men lurking behind the screens will be the perfect father

programme.title: Dating Naked UK

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam form a garage rock band and ask Laineyn and Erica to get involved, eventually leading to unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Charles and Diana's royal wedding has Bev wanting to renew her wedding vows with Murray. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam accidentally gets Barry kicked out of his cool group of friends, so he comes up with a plan to get his brother back in favour by convincing them he has the hacking skills to access the school's computer system to change their grades. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2011, Anna turned wedding planner for her girly bride-to-be Sian. Now they are back - along with Sian's mum Shirley and Anna's best woman Jade - to relive the climactic events

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Fed up with his family's feuding, Jack pleads with Beth, Leah throws a welcome home party for herself and Imran, while two residents get closer

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.desc: Three pairs of partners compete for the £1,000 prize in the Colchester area, with Yvonne and Neil kicking off the week with a Spanish-themed menu. Tony and Victoria serve up a menu of hearty pub food, but a mix-up in the kitchen leads to a very disappointed guest, and on the final night, Darren and Amy aim to impress with an evening of unprocessed food

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Big mistakes are piling up already. The guests bombard chef Josh with eccentric requests, and a deckhand makes a crazy decision with a jellyfish

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: There is scepticism, competition and high emotions when Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famous doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book, Clean Out Your Junk Drawer, encourages people to get out all their emotional junk to become healthier people and better partners and spouses

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria rents a cabin in the mountains in which she hopes she and her family will be able to enjoy a picture-perfect white Christmas. However, when the clan arrives, unhelpful weather and a random eccentric guest conspire to ruin the festive cheer. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cam resolve to make up for their bad carolling experience last year, and Jay has a huge announcement that catches Claire off-guard. Comedy, starring Sofia Vergara

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge starts her own sandwich shop after her snacks become a huge hit at Springfield Elementary. However, running a business proves challenging - especially when the same franchise opens another location across the street

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Eco-disaster looms in Springfield when Mr Burns launches a controversial fracking operation - and while Homer is more than happy to play accomplice to his boss, an outraged Lisa calls on the services of bigshot politician Maxine Lombard (voiced by two-time Oscar winner Jane Fonda) to shut Burns down. Against the odds, however, the opponents end up falling for one another

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a crossover episode with Futurama, the Planet Express crew members travel back in time and turn up in Springfield on a mission to prevent the troublesome family from destroying the future. It's not just a question of asking nicely however - Bender has been programmed to kill Bart, Terminator-style. Can the clan foil the murderous bot?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Tuckers throw a huge Thanksgiving party and Cameron spares no expense, while Jay has to figure out a way to keep his blood pressure down on one of the most stressful days of the year. While Phil tries to get used to Rainer Shine dating his daughter, Hayley has to break it to her dad that she would rather spend the rest of her holiday with her new boyfriend than stay for the traditional family football game

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teenage daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected, while Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club, and unwittingly helps Jay with his petition. At the Pritchett-Tucker home, Gloria, Phil and Cam have formed a secret alliance to ensure their respective mistakes are concealed from their spouses, but Mitchell starts suspecting something just isn't right

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A simple texting error threatens everything when Manny and Luke put on a fancy winter ball at the school, Mitchell gets a wake-up call when he offers to help, while Jay's thinly veiled attempt to get out of it by pretending to want to spend time with Phil backfires. Vanessa Bayer guests stars as an overbearing mother

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch gets a shock when Cam calls a concierge to save his ruined New Year's Day feast, while Phil's dad Frank causes waves when he brings a date. Gloria and Jay have to decide who should take care of little Joe if something should ever happen to them. Guest starring Kelsey Grammer and Fred Willard

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes friends with a new girl at school named Harper, who happens to be extremely wealthy, Homer befriends Harper's father. However, Lisa decides to end the friendship when she realises that Harper is too entitled. With the guest voice of Kristen Bell (The Good Place)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer loses a large sum of money to Broadway legend Laney Fontaine in a poker game and, in order to settle his debt, he lends Lisa to the stage star for a month. Laney transforms Lisa into a showbiz kid, which leaves Homer and Marge wishing they'd never let her go

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfield's first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a parody of Richard Linklater's film Boyhood, this episode is a coming-of-age story chronicling Bart's life from the age of six to him becoming a fully accomplished young man. His tense relationship with Homer is catalogued, as is the fact that he is overshadowed by the more successful Lisa at every turn. These factors shape his personality and his future more than he realises

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone is happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and one dad panics

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.desc: Designer Daniel Roseberry and Ina Garten spend the day talking fashion, creating showstopping flower arrangements, and making amazing smash burgers

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers explore alternative ingredients during free-from week. The signature requires them to bake without dairy, before a hearty vegan technical and finally towering showstopping celebration cakes that must be entirely free-from gluten. With a place in the semi-final at stake, who will win the coveted star baker title and who will be leaving the Bake Off tent?

programme.title: Rachel Allen: Bake!
programme.desc: The chef prepares an iced orange cake and visits two American bakers who have imported the wholesome, home cooking of the Deep South across the Atlantic. They show how to make an apple pie with a twist, and the cookery school students cook a spinach, potato and goat's cheese tart with a shortcrust pastry

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure
programme.desc: The chef's countrywide tour brings him to London, where he stops off for a bite to eat at new restaurant Core owned by Clare Smyth, and visits a knife forge, where he learns the process of making Japanese-style knives. He also heads along the Thames to the village of Bray, home to the Waterside Inn restaurant. Here he catches up with old friends Michel Roux Sr and his son Alain

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Still in Hampshire, James views ex-formula one racer Jody Scheckter's epic car collection, and learns of his passion for buffalo mozzarella, which he makes in his dairy. James uses some of the cheese in his buffalo mozzarella, blackberry and beetroot salad, before crossing into Sussex to don fancy dress and experience the Goodwood Revival, which celebrates motorsport from the 1940s to the 1960s. The presenter offers a classic comfort recipe - roast pork with black pudding fritters and caramelised apples as he prepares to watch some of his friends race in the Goodwood Revival TT race

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge prepares a selection of dishes perfect for outdoor entertaining and lazy summer days, beginning with a whole seabass with lime and dill butter. Mary then meets experts Jules and Nick to have a go at catching crayfish in the waters of Oxfordshire, before using the crustaceans in an oriental vegetable salad. She then demonstrates simple recipes for lamb burgers with mint mayo, and smoked Texan chicken wings, and finishes with refreshing lemon and elderflower jellies

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge prepares a selection of dishes perfect for families, preparing a simple and easy herb flatbread and enlisting the help of two of her older granddaughters to make a chicken and bacon lattice pie. Mary then moves on to a light tuna salad with avocado and lemon mustard dressing and is joined by her grandsons to make cranberry and coconut energy bars. Her final two dishes are ideal for a stress-free Sunday lunch, featuring butterflied leg of lamb, and honeycomb ice-cream

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree works on great new ideas for cooking low carb, preparing grilled pork tenderloin with baby bok choy and roasted shrimp with cherry tomatoes and roasted lemon-chili broccoli

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: There's a new baby on the ranch and Ree is preparing a new-mum care package. It includes pampering goodies and a lot of great food including brisket and Angel Food Cake

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Fettuccine and Black Bean Beef Burgers
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares a selection of dishes including fettuccine, smoked trout, asparagus and peas, black bean beef burgers, noodles and pickle salad

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver rustles up pork Marsala, porcini rice and spring vegetables, plus Koh Samui salad, chilli tofu and Thai noodles

programme.title: Be My Guest with Ina Garten
programme.desc: Award-winning musician Jon Batiste joins Ina Garten for memorable conversation and to share his ma's famous Louisiana-style red beans and rice

programme.title: Be My Guest with Ina Garten
programme.desc: Allison Janney joins Ina Garten at the barn for amazing conversation, baked fontina, and perfect cacio e pepe.

programme.title: The Bounty (1984)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the mutiny on board HMS Bounty against Commanding Lieutenant William Bligh. As naval discipline breaks down while docked in Tahiti, the commander resorts to harsh measures to keep the crew in line. However, his seamen respond to his brutality with insurrection, and Bligh and his loyalists are cast adrift in a lifeboat, while the mutineers go in search of a haven safe from retribution. With Mel Gibson, Anthony Hopkins and Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The Bounty (1984)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the mutiny on board HMS Bounty against Commanding Lieutenant William Bligh. As naval discipline breaks down while docked in Tahiti, the commander resorts to harsh measures to keep the crew in line. However, his seamen respond to his brutality with insurrection, and Bligh and his loyalists are cast adrift in a lifeboat, while the mutineers go in search of a haven safe from retribution. With Mel Gibson, Anthony Hopkins and Laurence Olivier

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts as five colleagues who work for the police take part, answering questions about top 10 lists, then trying to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home prize money of up to £125,000

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Ranvir Singh in which Peter and Aaron, Tina and Jessica and Nish and Sanjay take on Riddlemaster Henry Lewis. They attempt to answer general knowledge questions and confusing conundrums, with only one team making it through to the high-stakes final with a chance to win a cash prize

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Double Team (1997)
programme.desc: A CIA agent is sent to a top-secret installation after a mission goes wrong, and is told he can never leave. When he realises his pregnant wife is in danger from a terrorist, he escapes and teams up with a flamboyant arms dealer to protect her. Action adventure, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dennis Rodman and Mickey Rourke

programme.title: The Most Dangerous Game (2022)
programme.desc: A father and son are shipwrecked on a remote island where they are caught up in a trophy hunt held by its mysterious owner, a merciless man who uses the land as an elite hunting preserve for stalking the most dangerous game of all: human. Remake of the 1932 film of the same name. Thriller, starring Chris Tamburello, Casper Van Dien and Judd Nelson.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The crusading cop gets on the trail of a serial strangler who is targeting homeless women. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: Babylon 5: The Gathering (1993)
programme.desc: The grand opening of a space station comes under threat when someone attempts to sabotage proceedings in ruthless fashion - leaving the commanding officer in the frame for poisoning the Vorlon ambassador. Sci-fi drama which began the series, starring Michael O'Hare, Jerry Doyle and Mira Furlan

programme.title: Polar Storm (2009)
programme.desc: A comet collides with Earth, causing a devastating series of quakes, floods and volcanic eruptions. However, when the dust has settled, it turns out worse is to come. The impact has pushed the planet off its axis, and if a team of scientists cannot put it right, the crust will shift, wiping out all life. Disaster thriller, starring Jack Coleman, Holly Dignard and Tyler Johnston

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: When Worlds Collide (1951)
programme.desc: Scientists discover the Earth is about to be destroyed in a cosmic disaster and race against time to construct a rocket that will transport them to a new planet. Sci-fi epic which won an Oscar for its special effects, starring Richard Derr, Barbara Rush and Larry Keating

programme.title: The Arrival (1996)
programme.desc: A radio astronomer discovers a signal transmitting to Earth and resolves to discover its source. Travelling to Mexico, he unwittingly uncovers an alien conspiracy to take over the planet and finds his own life in danger. Sci-fi thriller, starring Charlie Sheen, Ron Silver, Lindsay Crouse and Teri Polo

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The crew investigates the mysterious death of an entire star system, and it falls to Spock to make the ultimate sacrifice once they discover the cause of the problem. Sci-fi drama, starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve embarks on another daring mission when a government plane becomes the target for an attack by a stolen missile

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: The Narns launch an unprovoked attack on a peaceful Centauri colony, and raiders target transport ships near the station

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The ranger investigates when a lawyer preparing to file a police brutality lawsuit is found dead. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: The Client (1994)
programme.desc: A Mafia lawyer tells a boy where a politician's body is buried shortly before committing suicide, prompting a team of district attorneys to press the young witness for information. However, the streetwise kid refuses to give evidence unless his own and his family's safety is guaranteed, and hires a lawyer to ensure his demands are met. Courtroom thriller based on the novel by John Grisham, with Susan Sarandon, Tommy Lee Jones and Brad Renfro.

programme.title: Kiss of Death (1995)
programme.desc: A jailbird is persuaded to help the police lay their hands on a psychotic mobster, as a means of exacting revenge for the betrayal which landed him behind bars in the first place. However, he is soon troubled by his conscience, leaving him facing a dilemma as he is drawn ever deeper into treachery. Remake of the 1947 thriller, starring David Caruso, Nicolas Cage, Samuel L Jackson, Helen Hunt, Ving Rhames and Stanley Tucci

programme.title: Dragon Blade (2015)
programme.desc: A corrupt Roman ruler leads a vast army to seize control of the Asian trade routes. The leader of a band of Chinese warriors vows to defend his homeland from them, aided by a Roman general who has turned his back on the empire. Together, they assemble an army from 36 nations to repel the invading army. Historical action adventure, starring Jackie Chan, John Cusack and Adrien Brody. In Mandarin and English

programme.title: The Blood on Satan's Claw (1971)
programme.desc: Strange remains are discovered in a 17th-century farming village, and have a disturbing effect on the townsfolk. They form a sinister cult, performing strange and violent rituals to bring their demonic master back to life. However, a pious judge is prepared to use brutal methods of his own to root out the evil. Horror, starring Patrick Wymark, Linda Hayden and Simon Williams

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: T.J. Hooker

programme.title: Babylon 5

programme.title: Shark Season (2020)

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
