programme.desc: Will takes on the task of helping Jack with his graduation speech for nursing school. Unfortunately, he gets completely carried away in his attempts to write something creative and insightful. American sitcom, starring Eric McCormack and Sean Hayes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is persuaded to go undercover to win the trust of Fat Tony as part of an FBI operation to bring the mobster down after an incident involving recycling responsibilities and bribery. With the voice of Jon Hamm (Mad Men)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tension between Springfield Elementary's fourth and fifth graders spills over during a dodgeball game, leading Bart to arrange a fight with a fellow pupil. Marge gets back in touch with three friends she fell out with years ago, but she soon realises why they went their separate ways

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: The team work out solutions for animals plagued by the summer heat while one vet works to solve a puzzling frog case and releases an old friend

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: A'ale Ma'a Wau (Fish Out of Water)
programme.desc: The team crosses paths with a tough Texas Ranger who arrives on the island in search of his missing daughter. Kono and Adam's security is compromised and Catherine receives a job offer from an old friend. Crime drama, starring Alex O'Loughlin, Scott Caan and Michelle Borth

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A mystery woman attacks the founder of an AI company and the team must identify her before a major global conflict ensues. Kilbride's ex-wife Elizabet asks him to think about reconnecting with their son

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: The team races to rescue victims of a sex-trafficking ring that is preying on disenfranchised women, while Hondo finds himself at odds with Leroy and Darryl over the future of their business. Street confronts Chris about meeting with his hospitalised mother

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: The bombing of a Los Angeles police station puts the city on edge, leading the team to a final showdown with a group of domestic extremists. Hondo faces the fallout from a bold decision that threatens his future, and Tan takes a big step in his personal life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with a father-son relationship in a 1980s sitcom, using it as a source of inspiration to deal with Bart's hankering for a must-have mini-bike. However, when the youngster starts trading nuclear secrets with the Chinese government, Homer must find a new way to bring his son into line

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe achieves massive success when he turns the tavern into a gay bar, but keeps his heterosexuality a secret to remain in his new clientele's favour. However, the decision backfires when the pub's new regulars encourage him to run for office and become Springfield's first openly gay councilman. Meanwhile, Principal Skinner falls for a new music teacher. Guest starring Kristen Wiig (Bridesmaids) and Alyson Hannigan (How I Met Your Mother)

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Pam goes for an interview in Philadelphia - but her prospective manager reminds her of her former boss, Michael Scott. Meanwhile, Dwight needs Angela's help in order to give his elderly Aunt Shirley a bath, and Andy tries to make Pete and Erin feel uncomfortable. Double-length episode.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Oscar attends the funeral of Dwight's Aunt Shirley at Schrute Farms, while Todd Packer returns to the office to make amends as part of an alcoholic and narcotics recovery process - but instead hands out cupcakes containing laxatives and drugs

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa notices how a patch of wild flowers has a calming effect on two aggressive scorpions, and discovers it has a similar impact on Springfield's human population. A pharmaceutical company soon gets involved, leaving Bart to spot a potential money-making scheme

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony
programme.desc: Marge and Homer are invited on a weekend away at the Jersey Shore to smooth over their differences with Fat Tony and Selma, who have married after a whirlwind romance. Bart discovers a talent for detecting the location of truffles, which Lisa jumps at the chance to nurture

programme.title: A League of Their Own Road Trip: Southeast Asia
programme.desc: Jamie Redknapp and Micah Richards take on more challenges, and are joined by guests Maisie Adam and Mo Gilligan

programme.title: Riddick (2013)
programme.desc: A fugitive is left for dead by his treacherous followers on a dangerous world full of lethal predators. He lures bounty hunters to the planet in the hope of killing them and stealing their spacecraft, but finds himself forced to work with them against an attack by the monsters at the top of the food chain. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel and Katee Sackhoff

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick, Hank and Wu investigate a death of a ghost hunter who was electrocuted while exploring a supposedly abandoned, haunted house. The duo soon discover that a slippery Wesen is to blame. Elsewhere, Rosalee and Monroe finally go on their honeymoon

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate two murders and discover that the Wesen Council has sent a bounty hunter to Portland to have Nick killed. Henrietta gives Juliette some bad news. prompting her to ask a friend of her mother's to reverse her transformation. Renard meets with Viktor and Adalind

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: A trail of blood leaves officers puzzled, a man high on drink and drugs launches a tirade of abuse and a domestic fight leads to an arrest

programme.title: From
programme.desc: As Tabitha and Jade's troubling history is brought to light, things begin to unravel for another resident in town, while Boyd wants to test a dangerous theory

programme.desc: Part one of two. Sisko and Odo are summoned to Earth to advise Starfleet on the behaviour of the Dominion - but there appears to be a Changeling on the loose too. Meanwhile, Jake meets his grandfather, Joseph. Starring Avery Brooks and Rene Auberjonois, with Brock Peters

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A Russian brings news that one of the Goa'uld is conducting experiments on the unwitting inhabitants of a planet, prompting the team to intervene. However, its members soon find themselves the ones in need of rescue. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Weir wakes up in a mental institution outside Washington, where Dr Fletcher tells her that Atlantis and the Stargate programme are figments of her imagination. However, nightmares convince her that something more sinister lies behind the diagnosis. Sci-fi drama, starring Torri Higginson

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worf is pleased when his brother Kurn arrives on the Enterprise as part of an exchange programme - but his happiness is soon shattered as he is thrust into a life-or-death battle to clear his father's name and save his family's honour. Sci-fi drama, starring Patrick Stewart and Michael Dorn

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok crash-lands his shuttle on a haven for an alien race that shuns contact with outsiders, and it is not long before he is forced to protect three colonist children from a monster. Sci-fi drama, starring Tim Russ

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan mildly injures himself while chasing a shoplifter and the local district attorney wants to charge the suspect with assault, despite the officer's wishes. Lucy goes undercover, Lopez's wedding venue is seized by the FBI and Nolan meets his new neighbour

programme.title: The Rookie

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: When the Enterprise responds to a distress call from a Vulcan ship stranded in the Delphic Expanse, Archer and his boarding team are attacked by its zombie-like inhabitants

programme.desc: In the arid climes of the Arabian Peninsula, the animal kingdom answers to one true ruler - the merciless golden orb in the sky, who beats down his fury on the scorched sands until monsoons bring relief. But certain animals, from rugged dromedary camels and illusionist lizards to adorable rock hyraxes, have special adaptations to beat the desert heat

Meanwhile, Jungle School welcomes an extraordinary new pupil, Alba, the world's only reported albino orangutan, and vets attempt to round up a group of older orangutans for release

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: As the dry season takes hold in Luangwa Valley, lagoons dry up and verdant grasslands gradually turn to dust. Animals must take advantage while they can

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: An unusual colony of penguins on the south-western tip of Africa, driven there by human interference on their island homes

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There's a tasty treat of corn for the chimps, but Bart and his troop miss out and the new lemur boys get to experience life in the trees at Malagasy

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orangutan Amy becomes a great-grandmother as Awan and Jin welcome a baby boy. While there's more baby news for the newly released doucs and gibbons in Vietnam. There's an emotional milestone in the life of disabled chimp Chocolate.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Vet Arga sets out to rescue a newly orphaned one-year-old orangutan from a remote village, but when she arrives back at the school, the orphan is found to have a broken wrist. The release candidates have passed all their health checks and embark on the 24-hour journey by road and river back into the wild. 'Big Boy' Beni has a gum infection and is put on an even stricter diet, which means his beloved bananas are off the menu, and it is an extremely emotional moment for staff when five adult orangutans are at last set free in the wild

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: The documentary about the Luangwa Valley considers how the life of every animal is linked to the vastly different seasons - the wet and the dry

programme.title: Zambia Untamed
programme.desc: The dry season welcomes thousands of animals to the Acacia Loop as they search for food. There, each species battles to find its place in the pecking order

programme.title: Into the Wild: Colombia
programme.desc: The flat savannahs of the Llanos face seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving land, animals don't get a second chance

Meanwhile, Abby is unimpressed by Connor's romantic overtures. Fantasy drama, starring Douglas Henshall and James Murray

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and a team of experts visit the Guild Hall in Leicester to discover if previous occupants are still making their home in the building

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

programme.title: Bee Movie (2007)
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

programme.title: 10 Lives (2024)
programme.desc: A spoiled, selfish cat carelessly loses his ninth life, but winds up being reincarnated as a different animal in each of his next lives. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mo Gilligan, Simone Ashley and Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Mr Peabody and Sherman (2014)
programme.desc: A super-intelligent talking dog invents a time machine and adopts a human boy to assist with his experiments. The curious youngster cannot resist meddling with the invention - with disastrous results - and the duo have to journey into the past to undo the damage done to the course of history. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ty Burrell and Max Charles

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie (2016)
programme.desc: When a peaceful island is visited by mysterious green piggies, its up to Red, Bomb and Chuck, outcast flightless birds, to get to the bottom of the suspicious invaders. Animation, with the voices of Jason Sudeikis, Josh Gad, Danny McBride, Maya Rudolph and Bill Hader

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2 (2019)
programme.desc: Red joins forces with Leonard's team as the flightless birds and scheming green pigs take their war to the next level. When a new threat emerges that puts both Bird and Pig Island in danger, Red, Chuck, Bomb and Mighty Eagle recruit Chuck's sister Silver and team up with pigs Leonard, his assistant Courtney and techpig Garry to forge an unsteady truce and form an unlikely superteam to save their homes. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Peter Dinklage, Tiffany Haddish and Dove Cameron

programme.title: Monster Family (2017)
programme.desc: A young family is cursed by a witch and transformed into monsters. Animated comedy, with the voices of Emily Watson, Jason Isaacs and Nick Frost

programme.title: Monster Family 2 (2021)
programme.desc: Baba Yaga and Renfield are captured by a monster hunter, so the Wishbone family once again transform into a vampire, Frankenstein's monster, a mummy and a werewolf in a bid to free them. Animated comedy, with the voices of Emily Watson, Jason Isaacs and Nick Frost

programme.title: Corpse Bride (2005)
programme.desc: Shy bridegroom Victor unintentionally gets himself hitched to a ghostly bride, who lures him down into the netherworld. But as he strives to find his way back to the land of the living, a treacherous aristocrat is scheming to marry Victor's flesh-and-blood fiancee. Tim Burton's stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Helena Bonham Carter, Emily Watson, Christopher Lee and Richard E Grant

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania (2012)
programme.desc: Dracula opens a luxury resort for monsters, to provide a refuge from terrified humans. His cosy sanctuary is disrupted when a normal man unwittingly checks in, and the situation is complicated when the unwanted guest takes a liking to the count's daughter. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015)
programme.desc: Dracula is worried that his half-human grandson is not showing any vampiric tendencies, so enlists the help of his fellow monsters in showing the youngster how it is done. The count is shocked to receive an unwelcome visit from his own father, who does not approve of his son's tolerance of humans. Animated comedy, with the voices of Adam Sandler and Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation (2018)
programme.desc: Count Dracula and company participate in a cruise for sea-loving monsters, unaware that their boat is being commandeered by the monster-hating Van Helsing family. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Adam Sandler, Andy Samberg and Selena Gomez

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Mr Peabody and Sherman (2014)
programme.desc: A super-intelligent talking dog invents a time machine and adopts a human boy to assist with his experiments. The curious youngster cannot resist meddling with the invention - with disastrous results - and the duo have to journey into the past to undo the damage done to the course of history. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ty Burrell and Max Charles

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank (2022)
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound named Hank finds himself in a town full of cats, who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villain's evil plot to wipe their village off the map. With help from a reluctant teacher to train him, Hank must assume the role of town samurai and team up with the villagers to save the day. Animated comedy, with the voices of Michael Cera, Ricky Gervais and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Sneaks (2024)
programme.desc: Ty is a designer trainer who lives a life of luxury and comfort. However, when a shady shoe collector steals his sister, Ty, is forced to venture out into the world, and onto the streets of New York, to rescue her. Animated comedy, with the voices of Anthony Mackie, Keith David and Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)

programme.title: The Ant Bully (2006)
programme.desc: A friendless, moody 10-year-old spends his free time terrorising ants - until the tiny creatures take their revenge by magically reducing him to their own size and forcing him to learn how to contribute to colony life. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Antz (1998)
programme.desc: A neurotic worker ant passes himself off as a soldier to impress a princess. However, he provokes a jealously ambitious general with an accidental act of heroism - so he and his beloved decide to flee the brutal colony and go in search of the promised land of Insectopia. Animated comedy, with the voices of Woody Allen, Sharon Stone, Gene Hackman and Sylvester Stallone

programme.title: Happy Feet (2006)
programme.desc: A young penguin disappoints his fellow seabirds with his inability to sing - but instead he displays a remarkable talent for tap dancing. However, his elders refuse to accept this outlandish behaviour and send the youngster into exile, marking the start of a wonderful journey. Animated adventure, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Nicole Kidman and Hugh Jackman

programme.title: Happy Feet Two (2011)
programme.desc: A tap-dancing penguin goes searching for his missing son, but his search leads him to discover a drifting iceberg that threatens to destroy his colony. He sets out to unite all the birds in the Antarctic to avert the catastrophe. Animated musical comedy sequel, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Ava Acres and Hank Azaria

However, he provokes a jealously ambitious general with an accidental act of heroism - so he and his beloved decide to flee the brutal colony and go in search of the promised land of Insectopia. Animated comedy, with the voices of Woody Allen, Sharon Stone, Gene Hackman and Sylvester Stallone

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)

programme.title: Cúl Stáitse - Oireachtas 2025
programme.desc: Since it first began over 125 years ago the Oireachtas festival has hosted some of the most prestigious competitions in traditional arts and has grown from an event frequented by the hundreds to now been one of the most important cultural events in Ireland. This year's festival in Belfast had over 1,000 competitors taking to the stage in song, music, dancing and storytelling competitions. This documentary follows the competitors, some taking to the stage for the first time, others returning veterans, while all strive for perfection and a place in the history books

programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. Desperate to discuss the Terminator TV series with her, the friends devise a number of plans to engage her in conversation. With Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Georgie and Mandy's First Marriage
programme.desc: Mandy struggles to get the Coopers to join for Thanksgiving. Young Sheldon spin-off, starring Montana Jordan and Emily Osment

programme.title: Georgie and Mandy's First Marriage
programme.desc: Georgie joins a church to sell tyres to the congregation. Young Sheldon spin-off, starring Montana Jordan and Emily Osment

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Cape Canaveral, Schrodinger's Cat and Cyndi Lauper's Hair
programme.desc: In an attempt to bond with Sheldon, George Sr takes the boys on a road trip to see the Space Shuttle launch. Meanwhile, Mary, Missy and Meemaw have a girls' weekend at the salon. Narrated by Jim Parsons

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius is forced to help Georgie revise for a maths test when poor grades threaten his brother's future on the football team. In doing so, he manages to pick up a few skills himself. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Montana Jordan

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: An Eagle Feather, a String Bean and an Eskimo
programme.desc: The young genius moves to Dallas to attend a school for gifted children, the family struggles to cope without him around any more. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Demons, Sunday School and Prime Numbers
programme.desc: A worried Mary sends Sheldon off to Sunday school after she finds him playing Dungeons and Dragons with Tam and Billy, but Sheldon is soon inspired to study a variety of religions. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco, Valerie Azlynn, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny catches the eye of comic-book shopkeeper Stuart, and Leonard is devastated when she gives serious consideration to dating her new admirer. Desperate for help, Leonard enlists Sheldon to discredit his love rival by preying on his obsession with Batman. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Kevin Sussman star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart takes Penny out for a second date, during which she drunkenly reveals her true feelings. Meanwhile, Howard uncovers a flaw in the toilet he designed for a Nasa space shuttle, and asks his friends to help him correct it before the launch. Kaley Cuoco, Kevin Sussman and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon wins a grant to pay for a summer expedition to the North Pole, and invites his friends to join him. However, the gang's imminent departure causes Leonard and Penny to reconsider their feelings for each other. Johnny Gale and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: Documentary about the Lake District Mountain Rescue Association. From paragliders crashing into the mountainside, to scramblers who have fallen down waterfalls or adventurers becoming lost in the tunnel systems of disused quarries, the volunteers will drop everything to head out to the hills and bring home the lost, injured and stricken. In this episode, the team is dispatched to help a man with a dislocated shoulder at the popular Eskdale Pools. Miles from the nearest road, the challenge of how to transport him to a hospital is a dilemma for team leader John

programme.desc: The priest walks in on a man standing over the body of his dead wife, while Mrs McCarthy strikes it lucky at the church bingo with the help of a fortune teller her sister has befriended. Guest starring Niamh Cusack

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The owner of an exclusive dating website is murdered, and although Jane is certain the victim's wife is to blame, she is released due to a lack of evidence. When holes begin to appear in her alibi, the consultant discovers a way to convict her of the crime, while the rest of the team learns that some of the women at the agency are filming their encounters with wealthy men so they can blackmail them. Crime drama, starring Simon Baker

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a truck transporting liquid explosive is hijacked by criminals, Charlie and Rex must race against time to prevent the case from blowing sky high

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie investigates a lethal poisoning in a hotel, and using her scrupulous eye for detail to scan the scene, she notices an unusual device used to bug the phone of the suite directly above the victim's room. Such gadgets are frequently used by a rogue paramilitary group named Alpha H, giving the team reason to believe the deceased may have been collateral damage in a much bigger assassination plot

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Jack Mooney and his team are tested when a billionaire's fiancee falls from a balcony the day before her lavish wedding. Everything points to suicide - except for the fact that the victim only painted one fingernail. With guest appearances by Denis Lawson, Elizabeth Berrington and Jemima Rooper

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective's estranged father is suspected of murder after being found standing drunk next to a dead body. Murdoch questions his own impartiality after new evidence is found, while also experiencing flashbacks concerning the death of his mother after a family bust-up. Yannick Bisson stars

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After Maeve Lochlin's father Pat is accused of murdering Roger Barford, Maeve and her boyfriend Sid Carter travel to Kembleford to ask Father Brown to help them clear his name. programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden investigate the death of a member of the men's eight rowing team at a prestigious club. Richard Hartley came from an eminent Toronto family with a great deal of influence and was a newly appointed member of the team. However, it emerges he had recently had an argument with his coach. Yannick Bisson stars

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective investigates the death of a man apparently forced to drink varnish. He encounters the victim's son, a ventriloquist who claims his father was an alcoholic. Author Arthur Conan Doyle helps him in his quest, claiming he wants to base a new character on Murdoch

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After Maeve Lochlin's father Pat is accused of murdering Roger Barford, Maeve and her boyfriend Sid Carter travel to Kembleford to ask Father Brown to help them clear his name. However, things don't look good for Pat when it is revealed that he and Roger had an argument about money on the night Roger was killed

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Jane deals with two failed robberies, one resulting in the murder of a repair shop owner, and the other involving a former suspect the consultant hired to break into LaRoche's home. Crime drama, starring Simon Baker

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.sub-title: A Stab in the Dark Web
programme.desc: As Major Crimes investigates a dark web marketplace, Charlie and Rex protect a witness in their home

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie is forced to confront her painful past when Dr Eugene Lustig, a prominent researcher who helped her understand her condition, is found dead - having fallen from a 12-storey building. A recent conflict puts his disgruntled assistant at the top of the suspect list - until he too is killed - and a search of the latest victim's apartment uncovers a box of tapes from one of Lustig's studies, some of which include footage of Carrie. A cassette is missing, however, and its significance could be the key to cracking the case

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team enter the high-stakes world of poker when Bobby Rodrigues, the favourite to win the Caribbean Masters tournament, is poisoned mid-game. As all fellow players are confined to their seats for the entire match, and no other individual is allowed access to the stage during that time, suspicion soon falls upon each player. A novice to poker, Jack enlists Dwayne's assistance in getting the players to show their hand, while Florence, who is forced to keep away from work after an injury, finds her own way to help the case. Nigel Planer, Mark Benton and Zoe Telford guest star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank O'Toole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victim's wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Tom Allen, Geoff Norcott, Vicki Pepperdine and Esme Young join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Steph McGovern, Richard Osman, Jennifer Saunders and Joe Sugg join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Guests Jo Brand, Clive Anderson and Jimmy Carr join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme 'new' in this extended episode. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.desc: Dave Gorman performs another of his witty stand-up shows, looking at 'fun facts', the public's perception of Richard Branson and why David Dickinson must be stopped in his tracks

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A refugee from war-torn Venezuela tells officers how she paid human traffickers to smuggle her through Central America and to the Mexico-United States border. In Laredo, an American couple caught smuggling methamphetamine inside cans of vegetables crumble while being questioned and give officers information about a chain of so-called 'stash houses' where drugs and illegal immigrants are being kept

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers face a harrowing situation as a family from Venezuela pleads with them to enter America. In Progreso, a suspected drug dealer is caught smuggling pills in his underpants

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef reveals the Cornwall that he knows and loves, championing the food, history, music, art and culture of the county. He begins at his family home in Trevose Head on the north coast, where as a child he would go fishing with his father

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets a family who make some of the best Gouda cheese in Britain, and uses their creations to make a tortilla dish with caramelised apples and onions. In the fishing village of Mevagissey, he discovers the origins of the sea shanty and the history of the pilchard fishing industry, when shoals of pilchards were so large they would attract killer whales

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets chef Tom Adams, who runs Combeshead Farm, a leading field-to-fork restaurant where they grow and produce all of their own food, from sourdough bread to pork pies, as well as rearing a small herd of Mangalitsa pigs, a hairy, old-world breed that produces exquisite hams. Rick tries out a new recipe - pork chops with a sloe berry sauce - before moving on to the village of Rock, where his son Jack holds a clam bake on the shore of the Camel Estuary

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick discovers an unusual superstition and a rare type of Norman castle in Launceston, before meeting musicians Graham Fitkin and Ruth Wall in the far west of Cornwall

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond and James May try mini-cabbing and take the Renault Scenic and the Ford C-Max out for a spin. Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of the Spyker C8 Spyder, and Lionel Richie puts his motoring skills to the test as the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson puts the Ford GT and the electric/petrol hybrid Toyota Prius through their paces, while Richard Hammond waxes lyrical about Rover's V8 engine. James May scrutinises the Maserati Quattroporte, and actor Martin Clunes is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Comedy actors Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer travel to the picturesque River Usk in south Wales, where Paul's father first taught him to fish as a young child. The duo discuss their respective childhoods and reflect on their own family lives and values. In their cosy cottage accommodation in the heart of the countryside they compare school photographs and Paul serenades Bob with his guitar. Once outside in the picturesque environment, their quarry is the wild brown trout

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Libya, visiting areas of the country devastated by recent fighting as well as one of the world's best preserved ancient Roman cities. He moves on to Tunisia, where he discovers a mountain fortress and meets a man keeping ancient Berber traditions alive, including making olive oil with the help of camels. Finally, he crosses the sea to Sicily, and discovers how the Mafia are attempting to take advantage of declining population numbers

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Asian Adventure
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King travel around Asia exploring the roots of some of their favourite dishes from the continent. They begin in Hong Kong, where they learn about the versatility of the wok in Cantonese cuisine at a street-food stall, while breakfast reveals a surprising legacy of British rule, before the duo are sent on their way with a traditional Chinese good luck ceremony

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef reveals the Cornwall that he knows and loves, championing the food, history, music, art and culture of the county. He begins at his family home in Trevose Head on the north coast, where as a child he would go fishing with his father

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Tom Allen, Geoff Norcott, Vicki Pepperdine and Esme Young join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Jo Brand, Simon Day, Kiri Pritchard-McLean and Henning Wehn join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop are joined by a variety of guest hosts and panellists for a compilation that looks back at the big news of 2024

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Guests Jo Brand, Clive Anderson and Jimmy Carr join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme 'new' in this extended episode. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, in which guests join team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea to answer questions based on opinion polls. Aisling is joined by Rizzle Kicks' Jordan Stephens and comedian Desiree Burch, while Rob teams up with Loose Women panellist Ayda Field and comic Dane Baptiste

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain hosts as Angela Barnes, Ed Gamble, Rhys James, Milton Jones and Maisie Adam join regular panellist Hugh Dennis to take a comic look back on the latest events in news and politics. Once again, stand-up and improvisation are the name of the game as the contestants try to get one up on one another

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: James Acaster, Dani Dyer, Oti Mabuse and Fred Sirieix join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Jo Brand, Simon Day, Kiri Pritchard-McLean and Henning Wehn join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Stephen Fry presents an extended edition of the quiz that tests the most obscure parts of contestants' general knowledge, awarding points for interesting answers as well as correct ones. Regular panellist Alan Davies is joined by Bill Bailey, Jimmy Carr and Only Connect host Victoria Coren Mitchell to answer fiendish questions on the topic of jargon

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.sub-title: Just Chips that Haven't Been Made Yet
programme.desc: The comedian ponders modern life, considering celebrity endorsements, and revealing what the Queen really thinks about shoe insoles

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Ben is angry when a Halloween party is thrown at his house without his permission. Tom acts as an MC for an event in Leslie's campaign, but uses it as a way to promote his company. Meanwhile, Ron and Ann give an unusual wedding gift to Andy and April

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: More than 100 boxes full of drugs are discovered inside an unlikely vehicle at the World Trade Bridge. In Progreso, a suspected gang member attempts to cross into the United States

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man kidnapped and beaten by a Mexican drug cartel flees across the bridge into America. At Progreso International Bridge, a woman is caught hiding anti-anxiety pills in her bra

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick journeys inland from the majestic Camel Estuary to one of Britain's finest vineyards, where he joins in harvesting the grapes to discover that the Cornish weather is perfect making some of the best wine in the country. Just off Pentire Point, as the sun sets, Rick rides the gentle swell of the north Atlantic with an old friend, casting his line to hook Britain's fastest fish, before firing up the barbecue to cook his catch with a recipe inspired from a trip to Goa. Rick joins Tim Smit, best known for starting the hugely successful Eden Project, who reveals to Rick his new and ambitious idea in Cornwall

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Fowey Estuary, one of Cornwall's hidden secrets, joining a friend on a boat trip to learn about the history of the area and getting a unique view of the buildings along the riverbank. He discovers the area's history of piracy, meets a family that make award-winning vodka, and makes a pancake with a wild blackberry compote and Cornish clotted cream

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: On the wild north Atlantic coast, Rick heads out to sea to go fishing for lobsters with his old friend and celebrity chef Nathan Outlaw, before helping to cook up a lobster risotto. Later, at Tresillian House near Newquay, Rick meets with head gardener John Harris to find out more about his Victorian walled garden

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: At Golitha Falls, where the River Fowey tumbles down to the sea, Rick meets Dawn French, who has made Cornwall her home. In the shadow of Devonport Dockyard, he boards the world's busiest chain ferry to cross the wide River Tamar, the ancient watery boundary between Devon and Cornwall - along the way discovering an unusual event involving circus elephant. And he meets a man who thinks he has discovered the next superfood, which Rick used to cook up a delicious duck dish

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team reveals why the Isle of Harris is the perfect location for road-testing cabriolets, and find out if it is possible to parachute into a moving car travelling at 50mph. Richard Hammond unveils the blueprint for the perfect roadster and Ranulph Fiennes is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets a good soaking when he takes BMW's off-roader, the X3 out for a spin, and Richard Hammond discovers how the Corvette C6 is a break with tradition. Plus, James May discovers the biggest item he can get into the back of a Volvo V50. Comedian Patrick Kielty is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer brave the wild lakes of Essex in search of the mighty carp. They have the latest high-tech equipment to catch the biggest fish they can - and are fully prepared to stay all night if they have to. The pair discuss the true meaning of a mid-life crisis and decide to visit a beauty clinic to see whether there are any suitable treatments available to re-capture their youth. Bob reveals his secret recipe to make the perfect scrambled eggs - but it's not the only thing that shocks Paul

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The final leg of the journey takes in Morocco, where Simon visits a land borders between Africa and the European Union, and the coast of Spain, taking in the scale of the country's fruit and vegetable industry. He discovers why tourists are actively discouraged from visiting Corsica, and goes diving in waters that have the highest fish population in the Mediterranean

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Asian Adventure
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King continue their culinary journey around Asia by heading to Thailand, where they discover why Bangkok has a reputation as the street food capital of the world, and help serve up school dinners. Heading out into the country's central plains, the duo join paddy-field workers and find out how rice is grown

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.sub-title: Would I Lie to You? at Christmas
programme.desc: Jo Brand, Joe Lycett, Joe Swash and Ruth Madeley join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for this festive edition of the comedy game show. Did one of the panellists really program a satnav so their mother's trip to Lakeside ended up in the Lake District? And would one of the captains really hold up a train to get his daughter's cuddly toy back? Or were they just festive fibs? Rob Brydon hosts the fun

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.sub-title: Just Chips that Haven't Been Made Yet
programme.desc: The comedian ponders modern life, considering celebrity endorsements, and revealing what the Queen really thinks about shoe insoles

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Ben is angry when a Halloween party is thrown at his house without his permission. Tom acts as an MC for an event in Leslie's campaign, but uses it as a way to promote his company. Meanwhile, Ron and Ann give an unusual wedding gift to Andy and April

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: More than 100 boxes full of drugs are discovered inside an unlikely vehicle at the World Trade Bridge. In Progreso, a suspected gang member attempts to cross into the United States

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man kidnapped and beaten by a Mexican drug cartel flees across the bridge into America. At Progreso International Bridge, a woman is caught hiding anti-anxiety pills in her bra

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick journeys inland from the majestic Camel Estuary to one of Britain's finest vineyards, where he joins in harvesting the grapes to discover that the Cornish weather is perfect making some of the best wine in the country. Just off Pentire Point, as the sun sets, Rick rides the gentle swell of the north Atlantic with an old friend, casting his line to hook Britain's fastest fish, before firing up the barbecue to cook his catch with a recipe inspired from a trip to Goa. Rick joins Tim Smit, best known for starting the hugely successful Eden Project, who reveals to Rick his new and ambitious idea in Cornwall

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Fowey Estuary, one of Cornwall's hidden secrets, joining a friend on a boat trip to learn about the history of the area and getting a unique view of the buildings along the riverbank. He discovers the area's history of piracy, meets a family that make award-winning vodka, and makes a pancake with a wild blackberry compote and Cornish clotted cream

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: On the wild north Atlantic coast, Rick heads out to sea to go fishing for lobsters with his old friend and celebrity chef Nathan Outlaw, before helping to cook up a lobster risotto. Later, at Tresillian House near Newquay, Rick meets with head gardener John Harris to find out more about his Victorian walled garden

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: At Golitha Falls, where the River Fowey tumbles down to the sea, Rick meets Dawn French, who has made Cornwall her home. In the shadow of Devonport Dockyard, he boards the world's busiest chain ferry to cross the wide River Tamar, the ancient watery boundary between Devon and Cornwall - along the way discovering an unusual event involving circus elephant. And he meets a man who thinks he has discovered the next superfood, which Rick used to cook up a delicious duck dish

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team reveals why the Isle of Harris is the perfect location for road-testing cabriolets, and find out if it is possible to parachute into a moving car travelling at 50mph. Richard Hammond unveils the blueprint for the perfect roadster and Ranulph Fiennes is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets a good soaking when he takes BMW's off-roader, the X3 out for a spin, and Richard Hammond discovers how the Corvette C6 is a break with tradition. Plus, James May discovers the biggest item he can get into the back of a Volvo V50. Comedian Patrick Kielty is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer brave the wild lakes of Essex in search of the mighty carp. They have the latest high-tech equipment to catch the biggest fish they can - and are fully prepared to stay all night if they have to. The pair discuss the true meaning of a mid-life crisis and decide to visit a beauty clinic to see whether there are any suitable treatments available to re-capture their youth. Bob reveals his secret recipe to make the perfect scrambled eggs - but it's not the only thing that shocks Paul

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The final leg of the journey takes in Morocco, where Simon visits a land borders between Africa and the European Union, and the coast of Spain, taking in the scale of the country's fruit and vegetable industry. He discovers why tourists are actively discouraged from visiting Corsica, and goes diving in waters that have the highest fish population in the Mediterranean

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Asian Adventure
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King continue their culinary journey around Asia by heading to Thailand, where they discover why Bangkok has a reputation as the street food capital of the world, and help serve up school dinners. Heading out into the country's central plains, the duo join paddy-field workers and find out how rice is grown

programme.sub-title: How Errol Flynn Discovered the Secret Scar of Nora Batty

programme.desc: As the Gibraltar locals reel from the murder of shipping agent Gordon Fletcher, Brian and Gerry - last seen being carried off in a shipping container - find themselves stranded on the side of a Spanish mountain, and now face the problem of how to get back to the rest of the team. As Sandra attempts to unravel secrets stretching back over three decades and link what has now become three murders, she still has doubts about the innocence of charming entrepreneur Harry Truman - but that doesn't stop her joining him for lunch on his luxury yacht. Conclusion of a two-part story, with regulars Amanda Redman, Alun Armstrong, Dennis Waterman and Denis Lawson joined by Vincent Regan and George Irving

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Following his recovery from a life-threatening head injury, Leo's first case involves the shattered body of a woman found at the bottom of a block of derelict flats. A post-mortem indicates suicide, but the investigation is reopened when the pathologist uncovers evidence that the victim was shot before being thrown off the roof, and his suspicions are aroused when DI Neill seems reluctant to pursue the possibility that the deceased was an informant for an undercover police officer

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James charts the history of 4x4 vehicles from the jeeps of the Second World war onwards, revealing how they rose in popularity in everyday use and in rallies. programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. programme.desc: Dermot offers his body and Gary fixes up a burglar alarm in forlorn efforts to impress Deborah

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is upset that Trevor has decided to work for a mission project in Africa, and resolves to give him an unforgettable send-off to remind him of the loving family he has in Ireland. Cathy's family counselling session descends into chaos, Buster and Dermot land themselves in trouble because of a circus lion, and neighbour Winnie is delighted that her husband's libido has returned. Comedy, starring Brendan O'Carroll

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Peggy's piano skills upset Ted's delicate musical ear, so he challenges the royal marines to race over their assault course. Comedy, starring Paul Shane, Kenneth Connor and Ruth Madoc

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Home Counties, TV doctor and GP Amir Khan takes on presenter and talk-show host Trisha Goddard in a competition to make the most money from antiques, assisted by experts Tim Medhurst and Izzie Balmer

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Children's TV presenters Radzi Chinyanganya and Karim Zeroual travel around Wales looking for item to take auction, with the help of experts Paul Martin and Catherine Southon. Radzi decides to quite literally go for gold as he gambles more than half his budget on the precious metal, while Karim hopes there is money to be made from a 1950s stone duck

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Edina goes on a detox diet in another desperate attempt to get thin, but since this means cutting out the beloved Bolly it's likely to be just as tough on everyone else. Meanwhile, Saffy bumps into an old school friend with thespian pretensions and Patsy hits on the hare-brained notion of trying life without her famous fringe. Featuring Marianne Faithfull as God

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Saffy's autobiographical play is about to open at a fringe theatre and her father Justin arrives to provide moral support while Eddie, fearing public humiliation, lurks in the wings scheming with Bubble to ruin the show. Starring Jennifer Saunders, Joanna Lumley, Julia Sawalha, Christopher Ryan, Mo Gaffney, Naoko Mori and Miles Western

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: As Edina's PR company collapses round her ears thanks to Bubble, Saffy forces her to attend a Menopause Anonymous meeting, where she can share the experiences of other women and learn to love her hormone patches. The 'change' appears to be having an alarming effect on Patsy, however, who is turning into something of a domestic goddess. With guest stars Twiggy, Ruby Wax and Dale Winton

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Eddie Stewart sets the Pressure Test: to recreate his five-level high Tokyo Lamington Tower

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles heads to Maidstone, Kent, to meet former Royal Engineer and paratrooper Mo Morris. After 20 years in the service, he was given a medical discharge due to damage to his knees, and has been left struggling to walk unaided ever since. At present, his home is unsuited to his needs, putting pressure on his relatives as they try to help as best they can. Determined to give him back his independence, the DIY SOS team rallies the local troops, including tradespeople and neighbours, to work together and adapt Mo's house, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to make sure everything goes to plan

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of a couple in Halifax, West Yorkshire, whose eight-year-old son is paralysed and can only access two rooms in their house. The family home is in need of a major overhaul but with only nine days to complete the job, the gang needs help - and that's where local tradesmen and other members of the community come in, turning up in force to bring designer Gabrielle Blackman's ideas to life

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Since his wife died shortly after giving birth to their sixth child, Paul Makings has been valiantly holding the family together as they grieve. But he's facing even more problems - living in a two-bedroom house he has started to extend, and forced to sleep on the sofa. Nick Knowles and the team are joined by more than 100 locals in Misterton, Nottinghamshire, as they take on their biggest home build ever. However, they have to battle against a blizzard to complete the job in nine days

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Home Counties, TV doctor and GP Amir Khan takes on presenter and talk-show host Trisha Goddard in a competition to make the most money from antiques, assisted by experts Tim Medhurst and Izzie Balmer

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Made in Chelsea's Sam Thompson takes to the Cotswolds B-roads with his best friend, Pete Wicks from The Only Way is Essex. programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Toy poodle Monty was jumped on by a larger dog, damaging his hip joint. Monty is so small that very few surgeons can perform a complex total hip replacement on such a miniature scale, so the family are hoping that Noel can help. Another two-year-old, 75kg Caucasian shepherd dog Odin, has a condition where malformed vertebrae in his neck are putting pressure on his spinal cord, causing pain and impairing the nerve signals to his back legs

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A 'puppy special' recalling the amazing stories of some of the youngest, fluffiest animals for whom Noel has provided life-saving treatment since The Supervet began. They include three-month-old springer spaniel Poppy, who was treated in 2016 when she presented with some of the worst front leg deformities Noel had ever seen. In 2018, nine-month-old Jack Russell Bella was admitted as an emergency after being injured in a freak accident, falling from a carrier on a bike and badly fracturing her pelvis

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles heads to Maidstone, Kent, to meet former Royal Engineer and paratrooper Mo Morris. After 20 years in the service, he was given a medical discharge due to damage to his knees, and has been left struggling to walk unaided ever since. programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing and TOWIE star Pete Wicks immerses himself in the heart-warming and emotional world of dog care at Basildon's Dogs Trust rehoming centre. Pete returns to Dogs Trust, facing a suitcase of abandoned pups on day one and falling hard for Theo, a gentle Italian Mastiff with a serious heart condition.

programme.title: Hashtag Homicide
programme.desc: In April 2016, London police officer Gordon Semple was killed during a Grindr meetup, with texts and digital footprints guiding detectives through the case

programme.title: Hashtag Homicide
programme.sub-title: The Murder of Ana Abulaban and Rayburn Cardenas Barron
programme.desc: In October 2021, Ana Abulaban and Rayburn Cardenas Barron were killed by Ana's estranged husband, TikTok influencer Ali Abulaban

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Consumer journalists Nikki Fox and Matt Allwright hunt for antiques in Kent alongside expert guides Natasha Raskin Sharp and David Harper. As they seek out items to sell at auction, the rookie antiques dealers find the time to learn about William Morris's manifesto to save ancient buildings, and discover the connection between Kentish ragstone and the early Victorian dinosaur hunters

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Made in Chelsea's Sam Thompson takes to the Cotswolds B-roads with his best friend, Pete Wicks from The Only Way is Essex. Under the supervision of experts Margie Cooper and Raj Bisram, these reality TV star rivals go head-to-head as they swap on-screen antics for auction-worthy antiques

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Celebrity PR Edina works from home and struggles to cope after Saffy's departure. Matters come to a head when client Emma Bunton arrives for a meeting, and is horrified at the state of the house, but luckily Saffy turns up and lets slip a big secret that might just render her mother speechless. Comedy, starring Jennifer Saunders and Joanna Lumley

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Saffy's pregnancy sends her mum off the deep end, bringing nightmares about becoming a grandmother, her torture compounded by the taunting midwife. Luckily, Eddie's new celebrity book club started with Patsy takes her mind off her troubles, as Mariella Frostrup promises to bring her famous friends

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Patsy resents Saffy's new close relationship with her mother, but is soothed by an encounter with guest star Minnie Driver. Edina's delight at the prospect of having a mixed-race grandchild is topped by her installation of a panic room, complete with champagne and a surveillance system

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of Manchester couple Rebecca and Steve, whose life was changed for ever when they found out they were expecting triplets. Two years on, Rebecca is becoming depressed by the state of their small, damp, dilapidated house, which is unsafe for the children. The builders have just nine days to bring the property up to date and give this tired mum and dad the space they need for their active offspring. Luckily, local tradespeople and other members of the community turn out in force to help

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family. The eight-year-old was born with quadriplegic cerebral palsy and her home needs to be made more wheelchair-friendly. Enter the DIY SOS builders, who set to work on designer Gabrielle Blackman's vision, although with just nine days to complete the task, they'll need help. Luckily, the local tradespeople are also out in force, giving their time and their skills for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Ever since suffering a brain infection four years ago, Sunderland woman June Findlay has been unable to walk or talk and is totally dependent on her devoted husband John. Since then she has been sleeping on a hospital bed in the kitchen, with no washing or toilet facilities. Joan and John do their best, but Nick Knowles believes they deserve better, so he and his small band of builders - bolstered by an army of local tradespeople - set out to extend the Findlays' home, with designer Oliver Heath on hand to protect his vision. Can they give June back her dignity?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Consumer journalists Nikki Fox and Matt Allwright hunt for antiques in Kent alongside expert guides Natasha Raskin Sharp and David Harper. As they seek out items to sell at auction, the rookie antiques dealers find the time to learn about William Morris's manifesto to save ancient buildings, and discover the connection between Kentish ragstone and the early Victorian dinosaur hunters

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Broadcasters Mark Radcliffe and Edith Bowman put down their mics and battle it out to pick up some profit-making collectables and curios. Antiques experts Paul Martin and Natasha Raskin Sharp are along for the ride as they roar around the roads of the Midlands in an iconic DeLorean and a classy-looking Rover

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A rescue special, featuring the amazing stories - old and new - of some of the animals for whom Noel has provided extraordinary and life-saving treatment since The Supervet began in 2014, and the families at the centre of their inspiring stories. Animals featured include rescue whippet Wobble, who at only a year old in 2015 was wobbling due to a compression fracture in her neck and German shepherd rescue Bran, who first came to Fitzpatricks in 2019 and received an innovative custom total hip replacement - the first of its kind for a three-legged dog

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A five-year-old Bedlington terrier, who has suffered a broken front leg three times in the last four years, is referred to Noel with another fracture in her leg. Elsewhere, beloved fox red Labrador Jethro has arthritic elbows, which have left him unable to walk properly and are causing him great pain. Noel uses a tiny camera to take a closer look at the joint damage and determine the best course of action

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of Manchester couple Rebecca and Steve, whose life was changed for ever when they found out they were expecting triplets. programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets Lurcher Terri, who's terrified of the world and must learn to trust again, and helps settle a family of chihuahuas given up by their heartbroken owner

programme.title: Shades of Blue
programme.desc: As the FBI put pressure on Harlee, she refuses to provide any incriminating evidence on Matt - but she does mention teammate Tess's suspicious role in a murder investigation

programme.title: Shades of Blue
programme.sub-title: Who Can Tell Me Who Am I?
programme.desc: Wozniak realises Donny has been withholding information, while Harlee's attempt to feign co-operation with FBI handler Stahl backfires when she leads him to incriminating evidence. Loman crumbles under the guilt of shooting an unarmed suspect

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedian Lucy Porter and Chaser Jenny Ryan visit antique shops in south Wales. On hand to help are experts Serhat Ahmet and Steven Moore. An alcohol-themed spending spree sees both celebrity trippers purchasing items once used for marketing boozy products. However, they buy classy objects too, including something originating from Buckingham Palace and some quite pricy oak library steps

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of Manchester couple Rebecca and Steve, whose life was changed for ever when they found out they were expecting triplets. Two years on, Rebecca is becoming depressed by the state of their small, damp, dilapidated house, which is unsafe for the children. The builders have just nine days to bring the property up to date and give this tired mum and dad the space they need for their active offspring. Luckily, local tradespeople and other members of the community turn out in force to help

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family. The eight-year-old was born with quadriplegic cerebral palsy and her home needs to be made more wheelchair-friendly. Enter the DIY SOS builders, who set to work on designer Gabrielle Blackman's vision, although with just nine days to complete the task, they'll need help. Luckily, the local tradespeople are also out in force, giving their time and their skills for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Ever since suffering a brain infection four years ago, Sunderland woman June Findlay has been unable to walk or talk and is totally dependent on her devoted husband John. Since then she has been sleeping on a hospital bed in the kitchen, with no washing or toilet facilities. Joan and John do their best, but Nick Knowles believes they deserve better, so he and his small band of builders - bolstered by an army of local tradespeople - set out to extend the Findlays' home, with designer Oliver Heath on hand to protect his vision. Can they give June back her dignity?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Consumer journalists Nikki Fox and Matt Allwright hunt for antiques in Kent alongside expert guides Natasha Raskin Sharp and David Harper. As they seek out items to sell at auction, the rookie antiques dealers find the time to learn about William Morris's manifesto to save ancient buildings, and discover the connection between Kentish ragstone and the early Victorian dinosaur hunters

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Broadcasters Mark Radcliffe and Edith Bowman put down their mics and battle it out to pick up some profit-making collectables and curios. Antiques experts Paul Martin and Natasha Raskin Sharp are along for the ride as they roar around the roads of the Midlands in an iconic DeLorean and a classy-looking Rover

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A rescue special, featuring the amazing stories - old and new - of some of the animals for whom Noel has provided extraordinary and life-saving treatment since The Supervet began in 2014, and the families at the centre of their inspiring stories. Animals featured include rescue whippet Wobble, who at only a year old in 2015 was wobbling due to a compression fracture in her neck and German shepherd rescue Bran, who first came to Fitzpatricks in 2019 and received an innovative custom total hip replacement - the first of its kind for a three-legged dog

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A five-year-old Bedlington terrier, who has suffered a broken front leg three times in the last four years, is referred to Noel with another fracture in her leg. Elsewhere, beloved fox red Labrador Jethro has arthritic elbows, which have left him unable to walk properly and are causing him great pain. Noel uses a tiny camera to take a closer look at the joint damage and determine the best course of action

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of Manchester couple Rebecca and Steve, whose life was changed for ever when they found out they were expecting triplets. Two years on, Rebecca is becoming depressed by the state of their small, damp, dilapidated house, which is unsafe for the children. The builders have just nine days to bring the property up to date and give this tired mum and dad the space they need for their active offspring. Luckily, local tradespeople and other members of the community turn out in force to help
